shape.description: Pin the reported no-<h3> product shape: the title is a role="heading" div (h3 count MUST be 0), lang carries the language, and the data-sncf="2" annotation row is chrome to exclude. A silent re-save that reintroduces an <h3> would turn this back into an ordinary organic case and pass vacuously.

nodes.note: Russian product card with NO <h3> (title is a role="heading" div). Recovered by lang="ru"; classified on its data-sncf="1" snippet, so the Ukrainian chrome (localized date, store annotations, 'Люди також шукають') can't flip it.
Same no-<h3> product shape but genuinely Ukrainian (lang="uk") — kept. Proves the new lang path stays selective.
